prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.8 kg; Height 164.6 cm; BMI 24.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/63 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.2%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 259mg/dL; 9 months ago 229mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.2kg; 9 months ago 64.3kg; 6 months ago 66.2kg; 3 months ago 65.7kg; current 65.8kg), Height (12 months ago 164.6cm; 9 months ago 164.6cm; 6 months ago 164.6cm; 3 months ago 164.6cm; current 164.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 121mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 63mmHg; current 63mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 64U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 43U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 95mg/g; 9 months ago 85mg/g; 6 months ago 83mg/g; 3 months ago 99mg/g; current 101mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 60mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 129mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 128mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
